TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kan Naoto Kan Naoto (ryax sa 10 na byacing tay 10 squ kawas na 1946 - misu), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1946) mrhuw Gipun ta' misuw hya' ga Kan Naoto, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2010 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Kan Naoto minkahul sa Ube, Yamaguchi na Gipun. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1946 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Prime Minister of Japan canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: kan naoto kan naoto (rjax s~…ēa ** na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - mis~…ēu), ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw …£ipun ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a kan naoto, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral kan naoto minkańßul s~…ēa uő≤e, jama…£u ¶~ ®ńßi na …£ipun. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē prime minis~…ēter o* *apan ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
